name: vulnerable exhausted npc does not repeat same confession

source.purpose: Phase 5 cross-layer fixture. A near_confession beat in the last 3 turns moves 'personal worry' from a trusted NPC's willShare list into willNot as 'already shared, won't repeat without escalation'. Tests beat-memory + tier interaction, not single-layer lookup. Layered with tempLoadTag='exhausted' to also exercise the truncated-disclosure modulation.

beat_aul_confession.title: Aul's near-confession
beat_aul_confession.retrievalCue: Aul nearly named what he fears.
beat_aul_confession.text: Aul almost says what he fears about the writ widening, and stops a syllable short.

input.playerInput: Sit with him a while longer.

perTurnDeltaIncludes: Aul (npc_aul) — TRUSTED [exhausted] · WARM, PLAIN, LOW PROCEDURAL DISTANCE
posture: assumes PC is acting in good faith
will share: operational concerns, limited faction doubt
will not: become cagey without a new state event, personal worry — already shared, won't repeat without escalation
